title: Shulker Box Indicator
description: This mod displays the item and fill percentage for shulker boxes filled with few item.
body:
# Shulker Box Indicator

Welcome to the information mod specifically designed to enhance your Minecraft experience when dealing with Shulker Boxes. This mod is tailored to showcase detailed information about Shulker Boxes filled with a single item type.

## Features

With this mod, you can:
- **Easily Identify Content**: Quickly know the single type of item a Shulker Box is filled with without opening it.
- **Visualize Fill Level**: See the fill level of Shulker Boxes. The mod uses a color-coded meter that not only provides the visual representation of quantity but also changes its color from blue to green to yellow and finally to red indicating the fill level increase.

You can see it in action:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c596015b357aa28aeb61be49b0ba48690ba3cb1.png)

Try this mod now and start getting detailed information about your single item filled Shulker Boxes instantaneously!
